meaning: v.[璁灏嗚祫鏂欐暟瀛楀寲
examples: If you can digitize books, go for it.
With Lulu, you can also scan and digitize your old books, albums, and photos.
A film-transfer service bureau (find them online) can digitize your old reels of film.
For example, health care providers must streamline, simplify and digitize their health care records by 2015.
It could take more than 10 years to catalog and digitize WWOZ's vast collection.
